Lone Survivor (2013)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $125,095,601Details
International Box Office $24,709,031
Worldwide Box Office $149,804,632
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $29,395,479
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $24,466,150
Total $53,861,629
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Based on The New York Times bestselling true story of heroism, courage and survival, Lone Survivor tells the incredible tale of four Navy SEALs on a covert mission to neutralize a high-level al-Qaeda operative who are ambushed by the enemy in the mountains of Afghanistan. Faced with an impossible moral decision, the small band is isolated from help and surrounded by a much larger force of Taliban ready for war. As they confront unthinkable odds together, the four men find reserves of strength and resilience as they stay in the fight to the finish.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$90,872 (0.1% of total gross)
Legs:3.31 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:83.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$40,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.7 times production budget)
Theater counts:2 opening theaters/3,285 max. theaters, 6.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $183,127,848

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 25th, 2013 (Limited) by Universal
January 10th, 2014 (Expands Wide) by Universal
International Releases: May 30th, 2014 (Wide) (Venezuela)
June 13th, 2014 (Wide) (Ecuador)
Video Release: June 3rd, 2014 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody war violence and pervasive language.
(Rating bulletin 2271, 5/8/2013)
Running Time: 121 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Digital Cinematography, Epilogue, Intertitle, Scene Filmed in Night Vision, Slow Motion Scene, Voiceover/Narration

Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Dramatization

Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Based on The New York Times bestselling true story of heroism, courage and survival, Lone Survivor tells the incredible tale of four Navy SEALs on a covert mission to neutralize a high-level al-Qaeda operative who are ambushed by the enemy in the mountains of Afghanistan. Faced with an impossible moral decision, the small band is isolated from help and surrounded by a much larger force of Taliban ready for war. As they confront unthinkable odds together, the four men find reserves of strength and resilience as they stay in the fight to the finish.
